install_notes: Several bundled skill files in this pack are 12-33 KB. They will be truncated if the install runner uses WebFetch (which caps around 30 KB and often lower). The install runner MUST fetch these files via bash + curl against raw.githubusercontent.com URLs or via the GitHub Contents API (with base64 decode), NOT WebFetch. Specifically the five files in skills/ over 10 KB: creative-strategy-engine.md (33 KB), visual-formats.md (31 KB), hook-tactics.md (18 KB), creative-mechanics.md (15 KB), brand-relevant-keywords.md (13 KB), hook-voice-patterns.md (12 KB), hook-writing.md (11 KB). Example fetch: bash -c 'curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Motion-Creative/runneth-apps/main/runneth-classic/skills/visual-formats.md > /agent/.agents/skills/visual-formats/SKILL.md'. If WebFetch is the only option available, fetch each file in multiple passes using offset/limit parameters and concatenate, or escalate to the user.
description: The deterministic, opinionated Runneth, packaged as a single installable use case. Eleven upstream dependencies, eleven bundled Alysha craft skills, brain seed with theme classifier and per-theme chains plus Alysha framework supplements and Beta-specific references, an orchestrator that enforces a 12-theme chain and the Synthesis Gate, a 10-step setup that captures surface preference, winner-definition, integrations intent, watched brands, and customer voice before handing off to brand-audit, and a user.md sentinel encoding 11 voice and behavior rules engineered against the six failure modes from the Runneth 1.0 customer feedback dataset.

installs.purpose: Orchestrator skill — 12-theme classifier, per-theme chain runner, Synthesis Gate, surgical-edit router, Step 0 re-anchor
Setup skill — 10-step configuration conversation, runs once at install, re-invocable on demand
Foundation skill — brand identity, value prop, audience, positioning
Foundation skill — facts-only product specs from the brand site
Foundation skill — VOC across pain, desire, objection, comparison, use-case buckets
Foundation skill — search landscape and audience language
Foundation skill — competitor read with active-ad signal from motion inspo-creatives
Strategy spine — pain × persona × messaging-angle matrix across 5 awareness stages
Execution skill — structural patterns between hook and format (Implied Answer, Pattern Interrupt, etc.)
Execution skill — hook craft with 8 psychological triggers
Execution skill — 35 hook tactic types reference
Execution skill — native-feeling hook sentence templates
Execution skill — 45+ visual ad formats with stage and mechanic pairing
12-theme classification rules
Per-theme chain — analyze (performance, top/bottom, comparison)
Per-theme chain — concepting (ideas, directions, fresh angles)
Per-theme chain — briefing (Strategic, Assembly, Script paths)
Per-theme chain — creative_attributes (hooks, headlines, messaging angles, CTAs)
Per-theme chain — educate (why/how, principles)
Per-theme chain — feedback_qa (creative review and evaluation)
Per-theme chain — research (competitor strategy, audience research)
Alysha framework supplement — selling vs offering distinction
Alysha framework supplement — the 11 messaging lenses with stage fit
Alysha framework supplement — format-purpose-stage mapping
Alysha framework supplement — product foundation and competitive feature mapping
Beta benchmark supplement — 7 framings net-new to current Runneth's benchmark reference
Beta custom-conversion clarification flow — halt-and-ask gate on ambiguous conversion names

runtime_installs.trigger: At install time, before setup runs, so the rules are loaded for the setup conversation itself
runtime_installs.purpose: Append the 11 voice and behavior rules to /agent/user.md with sentinel guard for idempotent install
Add routing entries for the runneth-classic brain seed and per-workspace state

post_install.name: Run runneth-classic setup
post_install.description: 10-step configuration: surface preference, winner-definition, performance connection check, integrations inventory, watched brands, customer voice, optional uploads, hand off to brand-audit, closing handoff after brand-audit completes

post_install.name: Closing handoff after brand-audit completes
post_install.description: After setup-runneth-classic hands off to brand-audit and brand-audit completes, surface post-install-intro.md to the user in chat as the closing message of the install sequence. Resolve {{persona}}, {{pain}}, and {{inspo_brand}} tokens using values captured during setup and the brand-audit strategy output.

changelog.notes: Add install_notes field explicitly telling the install runner to fetch large skill files via curl against raw.githubusercontent.com or the GitHub Contents API, not WebFetch. Test installs found the install agent rationalizing partial content from WebFetch truncation. Same bundled skill file sizes ship without issue in brand-audit and creative-deep-dive, so the fix is fetch-tool selection at install time, not pack content.

Initial release. Bundles eleven Alysha craft skills, the 12-theme orchestrator with per-theme chain definitions, four Alysha framework supplements (selling-vs-offering, messaging-lenses, format-by-purpose, product-foundation), two Beta-specific reference supplements (benchmark priors, custom-conversion clarification), a 10-step setup conversation, and a user.md sentinel with eleven voice and behavior rules engineered against the six failure modes from the Runneth 1.0 customer feedback dataset. Declares 11 upstream dependencies (bootcamp, performance-bundle which cascades to brand-audit / paid-strategy-audit / creative-deep-dive / weekly-performance-deck, corpus-search, plan-mode, self-iteration-loop, team-member-memory, competitor-intel, health-alerts, add-roles-permissions, building-integrations, integration-capabilities-library). Apps and the dossier write logic are deferred to v1.1.
